narrative:
North Olmsted-04-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,057 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
